title: vendor: update to containers/image@a791c5446737
body:
This updates `containers/image` to be newer. In particular, it pulls in the recent changes I've made related to OCI images and being able to adequately convert OCI images to Docker images. Is it possible for us to tag a new release of skopeo after this is merged? It will make the maintenance burden of skopeo for openSUSE much easier (I'm currently backporting all of my OCI changes).

Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <asarai@suse.de>

comments.body: @cyphar I'll tag a new release as soon as we have https://github.com/containers/image/pull/180, https://github.com/containers/image/pull/182, https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/pull/264 and https://github.com/projectatomic/skopeo/issues/268 (should be by end of the week hopefully)
